calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Vedica Puri, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Magne L. Veimoen is present.
David Foran specially appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Nathaniel Jones is present.
Jaime Rush, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 136 6th Street #305, San Francisco, CA 94103.

This case settled, the trial date of September 10, 2007 is vacated.
